target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible destruction of facade and windows across multiple floors; structural framing appears intact; damage covers majority of visible target element area consistent with 45-75% threshold

summary: One building assessed with SEVERE DAMAGE (CONFIRMED), showing extensive facade and window destruction across multiple floors with intact structural framing. The overall scene depicts a large, multi-story building with significant structural damage, surrounded by overgrown vegetation and wet pavement, indicating abandonment or post-event neglect. The likely functional impact is complete loss of operational capability for the building due to the severe damage.
